citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 1:00 pm on
5/20/2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee/registrant by Called facility and left message USDA was at the
gate. USDA was met at the gate by a volunteer worker who stated the licensee was out of town until Friday.
The Licensee returned call 10:20am 05/21/2026.
Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations.
Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 1:00 pm on 
5/20/2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee/registrant by Called facility and left message USDA was at the 
gate. USDA was met at the gate by a volunteer worker who stated the licensee was out of town until Friday. 
 
The Licensee returned call 10:20am 05/21/2026. 
 
Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. 
Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
